assertions.text: Enters debug mode (not integration or audit)
assertions.evidence: Explicitly declares 'Mode: Debug | Platform: iOS (Swift, CocoaPods)' in the header.
States 'Following the common debugging checklist and iOS-specific diagnostic reference step by step.'

assertions.text: Identifies init placement as the issue (viewDidLoad vs AppDelegate)
assertions.evidence: Step 2 clearly identifies: 'The developer stated they put the init code in viewDidLoad of the main view controller. This is the primary problem.'
Shows corrected code in AppDelegate with application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:) containing CleverTap.autoIntegrate().

assertions.text: Suggests enabling debug logging to verify fix
assertions.evidence: Step 1 recommends 'CleverTap.setDebugLevel(CleverTapLogLevel.debug.rawValue)' before init, and Step 5 lists console messages to look for.
